== Notes for [[Item:Q87891|Q87891]] ==

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pacuvius_Calavius

''His wife, Claudia, was the daughter of Publius Claudius Pulcher, consul in 249 B.C., and his daughter, Calavia, married Marcus Livius Salinator, consul in 219 and 207 B.C.''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940C659EA1EFBBE49822EF79916C497C
geni:6000000011362497734

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
